title: Firebase の 500 エラー：原因と解決策
reasons: The article provides generally accurate troubleshooting steps for Firebase 500 errors, with most claims supported by official documentation or common best practices.

Some specific claims about certain issues always resulting in a 500 error code are not consistently and directly supported by official documentation, which often indicates other error codes (e.g., 401, 403, 400, or deployment failures) for those scenarios.
citation coverage is below the threshold
one or more claims are unsupported or unverifiable
required_actions: Verify the exact HTTP status codes returned for 'Improper security rules' and 'Missing Realtime Database indexes' when an error occurs, as documentation often points to 4xx errors rather than 500.
Clarify the conditions under which old SDK versions, incorrect region settings, or expired authentication tokens specifically lead to a 500 Internal Server Error versus other HTTP error codes.
Add more explicit citations within the text for each factual claim.
Add links to official documentation or primary sources for key claims.
Add official or primary source URLs for unsupported claims.

sources.title: FCM Error Codes | Firebase Cloud Messaging - Google
sources.claim: A 500 error in Firebase is an HTTP status code indicating an unexpected internal error on the Firebase server side.

sources.title: Firebase Cloud Messaging InternalServerError - Integration Diagnosis
sources.claim: A 500 error in Firebase is an HTTP status code indicating an unexpected internal error on the Firebase server side. This error often signifies a server-side processing failure rather than a client-side misconfiguration, requiring a step-by-step investigation.

sources.title: Report errors | Cloud Functions for Firebase - Google
sources.claim: If unhandled exceptions occur in Cloud Functions code, Firebase returns a 500 error. The example shows `return abort(500)` being logged for a function.

sources.title: Write conditions for security rules | Firestore in Native mode - Google Cloud Documentation
sources.claim: Functions within security rules cannot execute loops or call external services, supporting the idea that complex/looping rules are problematic.

sources.title: Firestore Security Rules with Firebase Auth Based on Document and Fields - ITNEXT
sources.claim: Complex conditions in security rules can be problematic.

sources.title: Index Your Data | Firebase Realtime Database - Google
sources.claim: Firebase Realtime Database indexing is done via the .indexOn rule in security rules to improve query performance for `orderByChild()` or `orderByValue()`.

sources.title: Understand Firebase Realtime Database Security Rules - Google
sources.claim: Firebase Realtime Database indexing is done via the .indexOn rule in security rules to improve query performance for `orderByChild()` or `orderByValue()`.

sources.title: Understanding Cloud Firestore Indexing - Eric the Coder
sources.claim: Firestore automatically indexes all queries for single-field indexing, but Realtime Database requires explicit creation.

sources.title: Index types in Cloud Firestore - Firebase
sources.claim: Cloud Firestore automatically creates single-field indexes, and helps identify/create additional indexes. Realtime Database requires explicit indexing for performance.

sources.title: Configuration of Cloud Functions (2nd Gen) | by Praneeth Bilakanti | Medium
sources.claim: Cloud Functions default timeout is 60 seconds. Maximum timeout for event-driven functions is 9 minutes (540 seconds). HTTP functions can go up to 60 minutes (3600 seconds). Timeout can be set with `gcloud functions deploy <function-name> --timeout=300`.

sources.title: Cloud Function Configuration. Function Timeout | by Praneeth Bilakanti | Medium
sources.claim: Cloud Functions default timeout is 60 seconds. Maximum timeout for 1st Gen is 540 seconds. For 2nd Gen, HTTP functions max 3600 seconds, event-driven 540 seconds. Timeout can be set with `gcloud functions deploy <function-name> --timeout=TIMEOUT_DURATION`.

sources.title: gcloud functions deploy | Google Cloud SDK
sources.claim: The `gcloud functions deploy` command supports a `--timeout` flag to set the function execution timeout.

sources.title: firebase-admin - NPM
sources.claim: Admin SDK can be updated using npm commands.

sources.title: How can I update from firebase-admin@5.12.0 to firebase-admin@6.0.0? - Stack Overflow
sources.claim: `npm install firebase-admin@latest` can be used to update the Admin SDK.

sources.title: Firebase currentUser.getIdToken() returns custom token after signInWithCustomToken
sources.claim: ID tokens can be forced to refresh by calling `currentUser.getIdToken(true)`.

sources.title: Verify ID Tokens | Firebase Authentication - Google
sources.claim: ID tokens can be forced to refresh using `firebase.auth().currentUser.getIdToken(true)`.

sources.title: How to get the refresh token from Firebase.auth.currentUser Android Kotlin - Stack Overflow
sources.claim: The `getIdToken(true)` method forces a refresh of the token.

sources.title: Write and view logs | Cloud Functions for Firebase - Google
sources.claim: Cloud Functions logs can be checked from the Firebase Console, and `console.error()` outputs will be displayed with ERROR log level.

sources.title: How to log errors to Firebase Cloud Functions Log? - Stack Overflow
sources.claim: `console.error()` statements appear as error logs in Cloud Functions.

sources.title: Structuring Cloud Firestore Security Rules - Firebase - Google
sources.claim: The provided URL is an official guide for Firestore Security Rules.

sources.title: Index Your Data | Firebase Realtime Database - Google
sources.claim: The provided URL is an official guide for Realtime Database Indexing.

sources.title: Known Issues · firebase/firebase-js-sdk Wiki - GitHub
sources.claim: GitHub issues repositories like `firebase-js-sdk` are relevant for searching for similar errors.

sources.title: Issues · firebase/firebase-js-sdk - GitHub
sources.claim: GitHub issues repositories like `firebase-js-sdk` are relevant for searching for similar errors.

unsupported_claims: セキュリティルールが不適切に設定されていると、クエリ実行時にルール評価エラーが発生し、500 が返される場合があります。(If security rules are improperly configured, a rule evaluation error may occur during query execution, returning a 500.)

Realtime Database で複数フィールドを`orderByChild()`や`orderByValue()`でクエリするとき、必要なインデックスがコンソールで作成されていないと 500 エラーが発生します。(When querying multiple fields in Realtime Database with `orderByChild()` or `orderByValue()`, a 500 error occurs if the necessary indexes are not created in the console.)
古いバージョンの Admin SDK を使用していると、新しいサービスの仕様に対応できず 500 が発生することがあります。(Using an old version of the Admin SDK may cause 500 errors due to incompatibility with new service specifications.)
Cloud Functions を複数リージョンでデプロイする場合、リージョン指定が不正だと 500 が返されます。(When deploying Cloud Functions in multiple regions, an incorrect region specification may result in a 500.)

Authentication トークンの有効期限切れ: SDK が古いキャッシュトークンを使用している場合、認証エラーが 500 として返される場合があります。(Authentication token expiration: If the SDK uses an old cached token, an authentication error may be returned as a 500.)
データベースクエリの失敗、API呼び出しエラー、型変換ミスなどが原因となることが多いです。(Database query failures, API call errors, type conversion errors, etc., are often the cause.)
セキュリティルールが不適切に設定されていると、クエリ実行時にルール評価エラーが発生し、500 が返される場合があります。
Realtime Database で複数フィールドを`orderByChild()`や`orderByValue()`でクエリするとき、必要なインデックスがコンソールで作成されていないと 500 エラーが発生します。
古いバージョンの Admin SDK を使用していると、新しいサービスの仕様に対応できず 500 が発生することがあります。
Cloud Functions を複数リージョンでデプロイする場合、リージョン指定が不正だと 500 が返されます。
Authentication トークンの有効期限切れ: SDK が古いキャッシュトークンを使用している場合、認証エラーが 500 として返される場合があります。
